topWin: Prophecy Scroll PNG exists — every death produces a shareable image card; combined with chronicle page and echo reactions, the game has its first real viral scaffolding
topGap: Supabase still not live — viral tools exist but can't form community momentum until backend activates
ignisNote: The Engage gap was structural — no viral surface meant no acquisition signal. Shipping three engagement-targeting features in one session is a pattern to repeat whenever a single category has been stuck for 3+ sessions.
